name: Fresh Apple Crepes
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Cooking apples (sliced, pared, and cored)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the apple filling: In a 2-quart saucepan, bring water and sugar to a boil. Add the sliced cooking apples and simmer until tender.
2. Cover the pan and keep the apples warm.
3. To prepare the cheese topping, allow the cream cheese and cheddar cheese to come to room temperature. In a mixing bowl, beat them together until fairly smooth. Then add the sour cream and mix well.
4. Assemble the crepes: Place 3-5 apple slices on each crepe. Roll up the crepes and place them in a single layer, seam side down, in a chafing dish.
5. Pour over leftover apple syrup and heat until serving.
6. Serve two crepes per serving, topped with the cheese mixture.
